topic: AI 发展史人物关系图谱(Hinton 谱系 + 跨代交汇 + xAI)

persons.identity: 深度学习先驱，多伦多大学教授，Vector Institute 联合创始人，曾任 Google 副总裁与工程研究员，2018 年图灵奖、2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。本研究单元中作为众多弟子的博士/博士后导师。
persons.identity_en: Pioneer of deep learning; professor at the University of Toronto and co-founder of the Vector Institute; former vice president and engineering fellow at Google; recipient of the 2018 Turing Award and the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics. In this network he serves as the doctoral and postdoctoral advisor to many of the figures shown.

persons.name_cn: 克里斯托弗·朗格-希金斯
persons.identity: 英国理论化学家与认知科学先驱，皇家学会会员。1947 年在牛津大学获博士学位。后转入爱丁堡大学从事认知科学研究，是 Geoffrey Hinton 的博士导师。
persons.identity_en: British theoretical chemist and pioneer of cognitive science; Fellow of the Royal Society. He earned his doctorate at the University of Oxford in 1947 and later moved to the University of Edinburgh to study cognitive science. Doctoral advisor to Geoffrey Hinton.

persons.identity: 英国应用数学家与理论化学家，分子轨道理论先驱，皇家学会会员。曾任牛津大学数学教授。是 Christopher Longuet-Higgins 的博士导师。
persons.identity_en: British applied mathematician and theoretical chemist; pioneer of molecular orbital theory and Fellow of the Royal Society; former professor of mathematics at the University of Oxford. Doctoral advisor to Christopher Longuet-Higgins.

persons.identity: 机器学习研究者；AlexNet 与 DNNResearch 联合创始人；OpenAI 联合创始人兼前首席科学家；Safe Superintelligence (SSI) 创始人
persons.identity_en: Machine learning researcher; co-creator of AlexNet and co-founder of DNNResearch; co-founder and former chief scientist of OpenAI; founder of Safe Superintelligence (SSI).

persons.name_cn: 亚历克斯·克里热夫斯基
persons.identity: AlexNet 主要作者；DNNResearch 联合创始人；后加入 Google Brain 任研究科学家
persons.identity_en: Principal author of AlexNet; co-founder of DNNResearch; later a research scientist at Google Brain.

persons.identity: 卡内基梅隆大学计算机科学教授，2016-2020 年任 Apple 首任 AI 研究总监。Hinton 的博士生。
persons.identity_en: Professor of computer science at Carnegie Mellon University; Apple's first director of AI research from 2016 to 2020. A doctoral student of Hinton.

persons.identity: 多伦多大学统计学与计算机科学教授，贝叶斯神经网络与MCMC方法先驱
persons.identity_en: Professor of statistics and computer science at the University of Toronto; pioneer of Bayesian neural networks and Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods.

persons.identity: Deep Genomics 创始人兼 CEO，Vector Institute 联合创始人，多伦多大学工程与医学教授。Hinton 的博士生（1997 年博士）。
persons.identity_en: Founder and CEO of Deep Genomics; co-founder of the Vector Institute; professor of engineering and medicine at the University of Toronto. A doctoral student of Hinton (PhD 1997).

persons.identity: 牛津大学统计机器学习教授，DeepMind研究科学家，层级狄利克雷过程等贝叶斯非参数方法先驱
persons.identity_en: Professor of statistical machine learning at the University of Oxford and research scientist at DeepMind; pioneer of Bayesian nonparametric methods such as the hierarchical Dirichlet process.

persons.identity: Meta首席AI科学家，纽约大学教授，卷积神经网络先驱，图灵奖得主
persons.identity_en: Chief AI scientist at Meta and professor at New York University; pioneer of convolutional neural networks and Turing Award laureate.

persons.identity: 圭尔夫大学工程学院教授，Vector Institute研究员，机器学习研究者
persons.identity_en: Professor of engineering at the University of Guelph and faculty member at the Vector Institute; machine learning researcher.

persons.identity: DeepMind研究科学家，ReLU激活函数论文共同作者
persons.identity_en: Research scientist at DeepMind; co-author of the paper introducing the ReLU activation function.

persons.identity: Google Brain 研究科学家（后任职 Apple/Google DeepMind），深度学习语音识别先驱。Hinton 在多伦多大学的博士生。
persons.identity_en: Research scientist at Google Brain (later at Apple and Google DeepMind); pioneer of deep learning speech recognition. A doctoral student of Hinton at the University of Toronto.

persons.identity: Google Brain（Google 大脑团队）研究科学家，深度声学模型用于语音识别的早期开创者之一。Hinton 在多伦多大学机器学习组的博士生。
persons.identity_en: Research scientist at Google Brain; one of the early pioneers of deep acoustic models for speech recognition. A doctoral student in Hinton's machine learning group at the University of Toronto.

persons.identity: Apple机器学习研究者，Dropout正则化方法共同作者
persons.identity_en: Machine learning researcher at Apple; co-author of the Dropout regularization method.

persons.identity: OpenAI 联合创始人兼 CEO
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and CEO of OpenAI.

persons.identity: OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and president of OpenAI.

persons.identity: 投资人、企业家；Safe Superintelligence (SSI) 联合创始人（曾负责苹果 AI 与搜索）
persons.identity_en: Investor and entrepreneur; co-founder of Safe Superintelligence (SSI) and former head of AI and search at Apple.

persons.identity: AI 研究者；前 OpenAI 成员；Safe Superintelligence (SSI) 联合创始人
persons.identity_en: AI researcher; former member of OpenAI; co-founder of Safe Superintelligence (SSI).

persons.identity: 哥伦比亚大学计算机科学教授，Vector Institute 联合创始人/研究主任，Amazon Scholar。Hinton 的博士生（1994 年博士）。
persons.identity_en: Professor of computer science at Columbia University; co-founder and director of research at the Vector Institute; Amazon Scholar. A doctoral student of Hinton (PhD 1994).

persons.identity: Google DeepMind 研究科学家，RNN/LSTM、CTC、Neural Turing Machine 等工作的核心贡献者。博士后期间在多伦多大学随 Hinton 工作。
persons.identity_en: Research scientist at Google DeepMind; a key contributor to work on RNNs and LSTMs, CTC, and the Neural Turing Machine. He worked with Hinton at the University of Toronto during his postdoctoral years.

persons.identity: Google DeepMind 研究科学家，DQN（深度强化学习）等工作的核心作者。Hinton 在多伦多大学的博士生。
persons.identity_en: Research scientist at Google DeepMind; lead author of the work on DQN (deep reinforcement learning). A doctoral student of Hinton at the University of Toronto.

persons.identity: 自动驾驶公司 Waabi 创始人兼 CEO，前 Uber ATG 首席科学家，多伦多大学计算机科学教授，Vector Institute 联合创始人。（非 Hinton 弟子，系 Vector 联合创始人。）
persons.identity_en: Founder and CEO of the autonomous-driving company Waabi; former chief scientist at Uber ATG; professor of computer science at the University of Toronto and co-founder of the Vector Institute. (Not a student of Hinton, but a Vector co-founder.)

persons.identity: Google 资深研究员，Google Brain 联合创建者，Google DeepMind 首席科学家
persons.identity_en: Senior fellow at Google; co-founder of Google Brain; chief scientist of Google DeepMind.

persons.identity: Google DeepMind 研究科学家与研究副总裁
persons.identity_en: Research scientist and vice president of research at Google DeepMind.

persons.identity: GAN 之父，曾任 Apple 机器学习总监，现为 Google DeepMind 研究科学家
persons.identity_en: Father of generative adversarial networks (GANs); former director of machine learning at Apple; currently a research scientist at Google DeepMind.

persons.identity: 蒙特利尔大学正教授、Mila 创始成员，《深度学习》教科书合著者
persons.identity_en: Full professor at the University of Montreal and a founding member of Mila; co-author of the textbook Deep Learning.

persons.identity: 深度学习研究者，曾创立并领导 Google Brain 蒙特利尔团队，后任 Google DeepMind 首席科学家
persons.identity_en: Deep learning researcher; he founded and led the Google Brain team in Montreal and later served as a chief scientist at Google DeepMind.

persons.identity: 纽约大学计算机与数据科学教授，GRU 与注意力机制神经机器翻译共同作者
persons.identity_en: Professor of computer science and data science at New York University; co-author of the work on the GRU and on attention-based neural machine translation.

persons.identity: Apple 人工智能与机器学习研究高级总监，前 Google 机器学习负责人
persons.identity_en: Senior director of AI and machine learning research at Apple; former head of machine learning at Google.

persons.identity: 斯坦福教授、DeepLearning.AI 创始人、原 Google Brain 与百度首席科学家
persons.identity_en: Professor at Stanford University; founder of DeepLearning.AI; co-founder of Google Brain and former chief scientist at Baidu.

persons.identity: 蒙特利尔大学教授、Mila 创始人、2018 图灵奖得主；2025 年创立 AI 安全非营利机构 LawZero。
persons.identity_en: Professor at the University of Montreal; founder of Mila; 2018 Turing Award laureate. In 2025 he founded the AI-safety nonprofit LawZero.

persons.identity: GAN 论文共同作者，现 Google 研究科学家
persons.identity_en: Co-author of the GAN paper; currently a research scientist at Google.

persons.identity: GAN 论文共同作者、条件 GAN 作者，曾任 DeepMind 研究员
persons.identity_en: Co-author of the GAN paper and author of conditional GANs; former researcher at DeepMind.

persons.identity: GAN 论文共同作者，DeepMind 研究科学家
persons.identity_en: Co-author of the GAN paper; research scientist at DeepMind.

persons.identity: GAN 论文共同作者，AI 创业者，曾任 DeepMind 研究员
persons.identity_en: Co-author of the GAN paper; AI entrepreneur and former researcher at DeepMind.

persons.identity: 斯坦福大学红杉讲席教授、以人为本AI研究院联合主任、World Labs联合创始人兼CEO，ImageNet发起者
persons.identity_en: Sequoia Professor at Stanford University; co-director of the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI; co-founder and CEO of World Labs; creator of ImageNet.

persons.identity: 加州理工学院计算与神经系统教授，计算机视觉学者，李飞飞博士导师
persons.identity_en: Professor of computation and neural systems at the California Institute of Technology; computer vision scholar and doctoral advisor to Fei-Fei Li.

persons.identity: 神经科学家，前艾伦脑科学研究所首席科学家，曾任加州理工学院教授
persons.identity_en: Neuroscientist; former chief scientist at the Allen Institute for Brain Science and former professor at the California Institute of Technology.

persons.identity: AI研究者、Eureka Labs创始人，前特斯拉AI总监、OpenAI创始成员
persons.identity_en: AI researcher and founder of Eureka Labs; former director of AI at Tesla and a founding member of OpenAI.

persons.identity: World Labs联合创始人，前密歇根大学计算机科学助理教授，计算机视觉学者
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of World Labs; former assistant professor of computer science at the University of Michigan; computer vision scholar.

persons.identity: 普林斯顿大学计算机科学副教授，ImageNet核心贡献者，AI4ALL联合创始人
persons.identity_en: Associate professor of computer science at Princeton University; core contributor to ImageNet and co-founder of AI4ALL.

persons.identity: 分布式AI研究院(DAIR)创始人，AI伦理研究者，前Google AI伦理团队联合负责人
persons.identity_en: Founder of the Distributed AI Research Institute (DAIR); AI ethics researcher and former co-lead of Google's AI ethics team.

persons.identity: 英伟达(NVIDIA)创始人、董事长兼CEO
persons.identity_en: Founder, chairman, and CEO of NVIDIA.

persons.identity: 斯坦福大学哲学教授，前斯坦福教务长，以人为本AI研究院联合主任
persons.identity_en: Professor of philosophy at Stanford University, former Stanford provost, and co-director of the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI.

persons.identity: 英属哥伦比亚大学(UBC)计算机科学教授，研究物理仿真角色动画
persons.identity_en: Professor of computer science at the University of British Columbia, researching physics-based character animation.

persons.identity: 特斯拉、SpaceX CEO；2023 年创立 xAI，2026 年 xAI 并入 SpaceX(Grok/X 成为其 AI 部门)；OpenAI 联合创始人之一。
persons.identity_en: CEO of Tesla and SpaceX; founded xAI in 2023, which merged into SpaceX in 2026 with Grok/X becoming its AI division; one of the co-founders of OpenAI.

persons.identity: DeepMind 联合创始人，现任 Google DeepMind 首席 AGI 科学家
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of DeepMind and chief AGI scientist at Google DeepMind.

persons.identity: DeepMind 联合创始人，后创立 Inflection AI，现任微软 AI 部门 CEO
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of DeepMind who later founded Inflection AI and now serves as CEO of Microsoft AI.

persons.identity: AIXI 通用人工智能理论提出者，DeepMind 资深研究员、澳大利亚国立大学教授
persons.identity_en: Originator of the AIXI theory of universal artificial intelligence; senior researcher at DeepMind and professor at the Australian National University.

persons.identity: 理论神经科学家，Gatsby 计算神经科学研究所前所长，现任马普生物控制论研究所所长
persons.identity_en: Theoretical neuroscientist, former director of the Gatsby Computational Neuroscience Unit, and now director of the Max Planck Institute for Biological Cybernetics.

persons.identity: Google DeepMind CEO 兼联合创始人，2024 年诺贝尔化学奖得主；其联合创立的 DeepMind 于 2014 年被 Google 收购。
persons.identity_en: CEO and co-founder of Google DeepMind and 2024 Nobel laureate in Chemistry; the DeepMind he co-founded was acquired by Google in 2014.

persons.identity: LSTM 之父，IDSIA 科学主任、KAUST 教授
persons.identity_en: Father of the LSTM; scientific director of IDSIA and professor at KAUST.

persons.identity: DeepMind 强化学习负责人，AlphaGo 主要设计者、UCL 教授
persons.identity_en: Head of reinforcement learning at DeepMind, lead designer of AlphaGo, and professor at UCL.

persons.identity: DeepMind 研究科学家，Monte-Carlo AIXI 主要作者
persons.identity_en: Research scientist at DeepMind and lead author of Monte-Carlo AIXI.

persons.identity: Anthropic 对齐研究负责人，原 OpenAI 超级对齐团队联合负责人
persons.identity_en: Head of alignment research at Anthropic and former co-lead of OpenAI's Superalignment team.

persons.identity: 美国 AI 安全研究所对齐负责人，RLHF 奠基者、原 OpenAI 研究员
persons.identity_en: Head of alignment at the US AI Safety Institute, a founding figure of RLHF, and former OpenAI researcher.

persons.identity: Anthropic 联合创始人兼 CEO，原 OpenAI 研究副总裁
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and CEO of Anthropic and former vice president of research at OpenAI.

persons.identity: VGGNet 作者，前 DeepMind 首席研究科学家，Inflection AI 联合创始人，现任微软 AI 首席科学家
persons.identity_en: Author of VGGNet, former chief research scientist at DeepMind, co-founder of Inflection AI, and now chief scientist of Microsoft AI.

persons.identity: 加州大学伯克利分校教授,机器学习与统计学泰斗
persons.identity_en: Professor at the University of California, Berkeley, and a towering figure in machine learning and statistics.

persons.identity: Coursera 联合创始人,insitro 创始人兼 CEO,前斯坦福教授
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of Coursera, founder and CEO of insitro, and former Stanford professor.

persons.identity: Google Brain 联合创始人,Google 健康 AI 高级研究主任
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of Google Brain and senior research director of health AI at Google.

persons.identity: UC Berkeley 教授,Covariant 联合创始人,机器人学习专家
persons.identity_en: Professor at UC Berkeley, co-founder of Covariant, and an expert in robot learning.

persons.identity: Anthropic 联合创始人兼总裁，Dario 的妹妹
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and president of Anthropic, and Dario's sister.

persons.identity: Anthropic 联合创始人、政策负责人，前彭博社科技记者
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and head of policy at Anthropic, and former technology journalist at Bloomberg.

persons.identity: OpenAI 联合创始人，PPO 算法发明者，后短暂加入 Anthropic
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of OpenAI and inventor of the PPO algorithm, who later briefly joined Anthropic.

persons.identity: Anyscale 联合创始人、Ray 分布式框架核心作者，前 Berkeley 研究者
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of Anyscale and a core author of the Ray distributed framework; formerly a researcher at Berkeley.

persons.identity: OpenAI 研究员，DALL-E、GPT 等核心贡献者
persons.identity_en: OpenAI researcher and core contributor to DALL-E and GPT.

persons.identity: 前 OpenAI 研究员，GPT 系列与 Whisper 核心作者
persons.identity_en: Former OpenAI researcher and core author of the GPT series and Whisper.

persons.identity: OpenAI 联合创始人，主导机器人与 Codex 研究
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of OpenAI, leading its robotics and Codex research.

persons.identity: 纽约大学计算机科学教授、DeepMind 研究科学家，Zaremba 的博士导师之一
persons.identity_en: Professor of computer science at New York University and research scientist at DeepMind; one of Zaremba's doctoral advisors.

persons.identity: 深度学习研究者，Inception/GoogLeNet 与对抗样本论文一作，xAI 研究员
persons.identity_en: Deep learning researcher, lead author of the Inception/GoogLeNet and adversarial examples papers, and researcher at xAI.

persons.identity: Google Brain 联合创始人，seq2seq / 神经机器翻译 / AutoML 核心作者，吴恩达高徒。
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of Google Brain and a core author of seq2seq, neural machine translation, and AutoML; a distinguished student of Andrew Ng.

persons.identity: 多伦多大学计算机科学助理教授,Adam 优化器共同作者,xAI 创始团队成员
persons.identity_en: Assistant professor of computer science at the University of Toronto, co-author of the Adam optimizer, and a founding member of xAI.

persons.identity: AI 工程师,xAI 联合创始人兼首席工程师,曾任职 Google DeepMind 与 OpenAI
persons.identity_en: AI engineer; co-founder and chief engineer of xAI, formerly at Google DeepMind and OpenAI.

persons.identity: Thinking Machines Lab 创始人兼 CEO；前 OpenAI CTO
persons.identity_en: Founder and CEO of Thinking Machines Lab and former CTO of OpenAI.

persons.identity: 微软董事长兼CEO；主导微软对 OpenAI 的数十亿美元战略投资
persons.identity_en: Chairman and CEO of Microsoft, who led Microsoft's multibillion-dollar strategic investment in OpenAI.

persons.identity: Transformer 奠基论文《Attention Is All You Need》第一作者，前 Google Brain 研究员，Adept AI 与 Essential AI 联合创始人
persons.identity_en: First author of the foundational Transformer paper 'Attention Is All You Need,' former Google Brain researcher, and co-founder of Adept AI and Essential AI.

persons.identity: Transformer 与 MoE 关键作者，Character.AI 联合创始人，2024 年返回 Google 任 Gemini 联合负责人
persons.identity_en: Key author of the Transformer and MoE work and co-founder of Character.AI, who returned to Google in 2024 as co-lead of Gemini.

persons.identity: Transformer 论文《Attention Is All You Need》八位合著者之一，原 Google Brain 研究员，先后与 Ashish Vaswani 联合创办 Adept AI 与 Essential AI，现为 Anthropic 技术成员
persons.identity_en: One of the eight co-authors of the Transformer paper 'Attention Is All You Need' and former Google Brain researcher; co-founded Adept AI and then Essential AI with Ashish Vaswani, and is now a member of technical staff at Anthropic.

persons.identity: Transformer 论文《Attention Is All You Need》八位作者之一，曾任 Google Brain 高级研究员；2021 年联合创立生物科技公司 Inceptive，用深度学习设计 RNA/mRNA 分子，任 CEO。
persons.identity_en: One of the eight authors of the Transformer paper 'Attention Is All You Need' and former senior researcher at Google Brain; in 2021 co-founded the biotech company Inceptive, which uses deep learning to design RNA/mRNA molecules, where he serves as CEO.

persons.identity: Transformer 论文《Attention Is All You Need》合著者，2023 年与 David Ha 在东京联合创办 Sakana AI 并任 CTO
persons.identity_en: Co-author of the Transformer paper 'Attention Is All You Need,' who in 2023 co-founded Sakana AI in Tokyo with David Ha and serves as its CTO.

persons.identity: Transformer 论文合著者，Cohere 联合创始人兼 CEO
persons.identity_en: Co-author of the Transformer paper and co-founder and CEO of Cohere.

persons.identity: Transformer 八位合著者之一，前 Google Brain 研究员，2021 年加入 OpenAI 并参与 o1/o3 推理模型的奠基性工作
persons.identity_en: One of the eight co-authors of the Transformer paper and former Google Brain researcher; joined OpenAI in 2021 and contributed foundational work on the o1/o3 reasoning models.

persons.identity: Transformer 论文《Attention Is All You Need》八位合著者之一，原 Google Brain/Google Research 工程经理，2017 年联合创办区块链项目 NEAR Protocol 并任 CEO
persons.identity_en: One of the eight co-authors of the Transformer paper 'Attention Is All You Need' and former engineering manager at Google Brain/Google Research; in 2017 co-founded the blockchain project NEAR Protocol, where he serves as CEO.

persons.identity: Adept AI 联合创始人兼 CEO，前 OpenAI 工程副总裁，现 Amazon AGI 实验室负责人。
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and CEO of Adept AI, former vice president of engineering at OpenAI, and now head of Amazon's AGI lab.

persons.identity: Character.AI 联合创始人，Google LaMDA/Meena 对话模型核心，2024 年随团队回归 Google。
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of Character.AI and a core figure behind Google's LaMDA/Meena dialogue models, who returned to Google with his team in 2024.

persons.identity: Sakana AI 联合创始人兼 CEO，前 Google Brain 研究员（World Models / 进化算法）。
persons.identity_en: Co-founder and CEO of Sakana AI and former Google Brain researcher (World Models / evolutionary algorithms).

persons.identity: Cohere 联合创始人，Hinton 在 Google Brain 的学生（胶囊网络合作者）。
persons.identity_en: Co-founder of Cohere and a student of Hinton's at Google Brain, a collaborator on capsule networks.

relationships.fact: Christopher Longuet-Higgins 是 Geoffrey Hinton 在爱丁堡大学的博士导师（1978 年获人工智能博士学位）。

source.verbatim_quote: From 1972 to 1975, he continued his study at the University of Edinburgh, where he was awarded a PhD in artificial intelligence in 1978 for research supervised by Christopher Longuet-Higgins, who favored the symbolic AI approach over the neural network approach.

relationships.fact_en: Christopher Longuet-Higgins was Geoffrey Hinton's doctoral advisor at the University of Edinburgh (Hinton received his PhD in artificial intelligence in 1978).

relationships.fact: Charles Coulson 是 Christopher Longuet-Higgins 在牛津大学的博士导师（1947 年获博士学位）。

source.verbatim_quote: He completed a Doctor of Philosophy degree in 1947 at the University of Oxford under the supervision of Charles Coulson.

relationships.fact_en: Charles Coulson was the doctoral advisor of Christopher Longuet-Higgins at the University of Oxford (PhD in 1947).

relationships.fact: Geoffrey Hinton 是 Ilya Sutskever 的博士导师。
